productDisplayName: Converse Men's All Star Canvas Ox Black Shoe
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Conversehave a retro feel.Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability Black denim upper with white stitch detailing for style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fit  Midsole Cushioned footbed delivers all day comfort Outsole Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Vulcanized rubber outsole with multi-directional pattern for flexibility and traction Shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
